nodes.name: cheats-gta5
onEnter:
say("🏙️ **GTA V – ALL CHEATS (PS/Xbox/PC)**

**💰 MONEY / STATS:**
• Lower Wanted Level – LAWYERUP / RB, RB, B, RT, Right, Left, Right, Left
• Raise Wanted Level – FUGITIVE / RB, RB, B, RT, Left, Right, Left, Right
• Infinite Health – TURTLE / B, LB, Y, RT, A, X, B, Right, X, LB, LB, LB
• Explosive Ammo – HIGHEX / Right, X, A, Left, RB, RT, Left, Right, Right, LB, LB, LB
• Fast Run – CATCHME / Y, Left, Right, Right, LT, LB, X
• Super Jump – HOPTOIT / Left, Left, Y, Y, Right, Right, Left, Right, X, RB, RT
• Drunk Mode – LIQUOR / Y, Right, Right, Left, Right, X, B, Left

**🔫 WEAPONS:**
• All Weapons – TOOLUP / Y, RT, Left, LB, A, Right, Y, Down, X, LB, LB, LB

**🚗 VEHICLES:**
• Spawn BMX – BANDIT / Left, Left, Right, Right, Left, Right, X, B, Y, RB, RT
• Spawn Buzzard Helicopter – BUZZOFF / B, B, LB, B, B, B, LB, LT, RB, Y, B, Y
• Spawn Comet – COMET / RB, B, RT, Right, LB, LT, A, A, X, RB
• Spawn Rapid GT – RAPIDGT / RT, LB, B, Right, LB, RB, Right, Left, B, RT
• Spawn Trashmaster – TRASHED / B, RB, B, RB, Left, Left, RB, LB, B, Right
• Spawn PCJ-600 – ROCKET / RB, Right, Left, Right, RT, Left, Right, X, Right, LT, LB, LB
• Spawn Sanchez – OFFROAD / B, A, LB, B, B, LB, B, RB, RT, LT, LB, LB
• Spawn Duster – FLYSPRAY / Right, Left, RB, RB, RB, Left, Y, Y, A, B, LB, LB
• Spawn Stunt Plane – BARNSTORM / B, Right, LB, LT, Left, RB, LB, LB, Left, Left, A, Y
• Spawn Caddy – HOLEIN1 / B, LB, Left, RB, LT, A, RB, LB, B, A

**🌦️ EFFECTS:**
• Moon Gravity – FLOATER / Left, Left, LB, RB, LB, Right, Left, LB, Left
• Slippery Cars – SNOWDAY / Y, RB, RB, Left, RB, LB, RT, LB
• Slow Motion – SLOWMO / Y, Left, Right, Right, X, RT, RB")

nodes.name: cheats-minecraft
onEnter:
say("⛏️ **Minecraft – ALL COMMANDS/CHEATS**

**💊 HEALTH & SURVIVAL:**
• /gamemode creative – Unlimited resources, fly, no damage
• /gamemode survival – Normal gameplay
• /gamemode spectator – Fly through walls invisibly
• /kill – Kill yourself (or other entity)
• /effect give @s minecraft:regeneration 9999 255 – Infinite health regen
• /effect give @s minecraft:saturation 9999 255 – Never get hungry
• /effect give @s minecraft:fire_resistance 9999 255 – Immune to fire
• /effect give @s minecraft:water_breathing 9999 255 – Breathe underwater
• /effect give @s minecraft:night_vision 9999 255 – See in the dark

**🔫 ITEMS & INVENTORY:**
• /give @s diamond_sword 64 – Give yourself items
• /give @s netherite_armor – Best armor
• /give @s enchanted_golden_apple 64 – God apples
• /enchant @s sharpness 5 – Max enchant held item

**🌍 WORLD:**
• /tp [x] [y] [z] – Teleport to coordinates
• /tp @s @p – Teleport to nearest player
• /time set day – Set time to day
• /time set night – Set time to night
• /weather clear – Clear weather
• /weather rain – Start rain
• /weather thunder – Thunderstorm
• /seed – Show world seed

**⚙️ MISC:**
• /xp add @s 99999 levels – Add XP levels
• /summon minecraft:wither – Summon a Wither
• /summon minecraft:ender_dragon – Spawn Ender Dragon
• /fill ~-10 ~-1 ~-10 ~10 ~-1 ~10 diamond_block – Fill area with diamonds")

nodes.name: cheats-rdr2
onEnter:
say("🤠 **Red Dead Redemption 2 – ALL CHEATS**
*(Press Triangle/Y to open cheat menu, go to Settings > Cheats, then enter phrases)*

**💊 HEALTH / DEAD EYE:**
• 'ABUNDANCE IS THE DULLEST DESIRE' – Infinite Ammo
• 'YOU FLOURISH BEFORE YOU DIE' – Full Health, Stamina & Dead Eye
• 'I SHALL BE BETTER' – Restore Health
• 'FOCUS' – Refill Dead Eye
• 'SEEK SEEK LEST' – Eagle Eye always active

**💰 MONEY & HONOR:**
• 'GREED IS NOW A VIRTUE' – Add $500
• 'BALANCE. ALL IS BALANCE' – Set Honor to max
• 'YOU ROGUE, YOU DEVIL' – Decrease Honor
• 'VIRTUE UNEARNED IS NOT VIRTUE' – High Honor

**🚗 HORSES & VEHICLES:**
• 'BETTER THAN MY DOG' – Summon horse
• 'RUN! RUN! RUN!' – Superior Horse
• 'KEEP YOUR DREAMS SIMPLE' – Wagon spawn

**🔫 WEAPONS:**
• 'A SIMPLE LIFE, A BEAUTIFUL DEATH' – All Weapons
• 'GREED IS AMERICAN VIRTUE' – Heavy Weapons
• 'History Is Written By Fools' – All Melee Weapons

**🌍 WORLD:**
• 'EVERYBODY IS STUPID EXCEPT ME' – Wanted Level Removed
• 'YOU WANT PUNISHMENT' – Raise Wanted Level
• 'VANITY. ALL IS VANITY' – Heavy Fog
• 'DEAD MAN TELLS NO TALES' – Drunk Mode
• 'YOU SEEK MORE THAN THE WORLD OFFERS' – Set Time
• 'THE LUCK OF THE DRAW' – Random Character Set")

nodes.name: cheats-sims4
onEnter:
say("🏠 **The Sims 4 – ALL CHEATS**
*(Press Ctrl+Shift+C to open cheat console)*

**💰 MONEY:**
• motherlode – Add §50,000
• kaching or rosebud – Add §1,000
• Money [amount] – Set exact money (e.g. Money 9999999)
• FreeRealEstate on – Buy any house for free

**💊 NEEDS & SKILLS:**
• testingcheats true – Enable all cheats (required first!)
• fillmotive motive_Hunger – Fill hunger bar
• fillmotive motive_Energy – Fill energy bar
• fillmotive motive_Fun – Fill fun bar
• fillmotive motive_Social – Fill social bar
• fillmotive motive_Bladder – Fill bladder
• sims.fill_all_commodities – Max all needs
• stats.set_skill_level Major_Cooking 10 – Max a skill
• stats.set_skill_level Major_Painting 10 – Max painting
• stats.set_skill_level Skill_Fitness 10 – Max fitness
• careers.add_career [career name] – Add career

**👤 SIM CONTROL:**
• sims.add_buff e_buff_Energized – Add energized moodlet
• sims.add_buff Social_Happy – Happy moodlet
• traits.equip_trait [trait name] – Add a trait
• traits.remove_trait [trait name] – Remove trait
• sims.spawn – Spawn a new Sim
• aging off – Disable aging

**🏗️ BUILD MODE:**
• bb.moveobjects on – Place objects anywhere
• bb.enablefreebuild – Build on any lot
• bb.showhiddenobjects – Unlock debug items
• bb.showliveeditobjects – More hidden items
• bb.ignoregameplayunlocksentitlement – All items unlocked")

nodes.name: cheats-cyberpunk
onEnter:
say("🤖 **Cyberpunk 2077 – ALL CHEATS (PC Console)**
*(Requires Cyber Engine Tweaks mod for PC)*

**💰 MONEY:**
• Game.AddToInventory('Items.money', 99999) – Add eddies

**💊 STATS:**
• player.SetStatDEV(50) – Max Development
• Game.GetPlayer():SetWarningTime(0) – Remove wanted timer

**🔫 WEAPONS:**
• Game.AddToInventory('Items.Preset_Achilles_Default') – Add Achilles
• Game.AddToInventory('Items.Preset_Nova_Default') – Add Nova
• Game.AddToInventory('Items.Preset_Lexington_Default') – Add Malorian

**📦 ITEMS:**
• Game.AddToInventory('Items.HealthInhaler', 50) – Add MaxDocs
• Game.AddToInventory('Items.Preset_Dex_Defender') – Dex's gun

**⚙️ GENERAL (Xbox/PS – Patch):**
• No native console cheats on console; use mods on PC
• Consider Cheat Engine tables for offline play

*Note: Always back up saves before using cheats!*")

nodes.name: cheats-ark
onEnter:
say("🦕 **ARK: Survival Evolved – ALL CHEATS**
*(Press Tab to open console, type 'enablecheats [password]' on servers)*

**💊 PLAYER:**
• god – God mode (no damage)
• fly – Fly mode
• walk – Disable fly
• ghost – No clip (walk through walls)
• InfiniteStats – Infinite health/stamina/food/water
• addexperience 99999 0 0 – Add XP
• LevelUp [stat number] – Level up a stat

**🦖 DINOS:**
• GiveEngrams – All Engrams
• GiveEngramsTekOnly – All Tek Engrams
• Summon [dino classname] – Spawn dino
• GMSummon '[DinoName]_Character_BP_C' [level] – Tame spawn
• ForceTame – Instant tame targeted dino
• DoCropGrowthInstant – Instant crop growth

**🔧 ITEMS:**
• GiveItemNum [id] [qty] [quality] 0 – Spawn item by ID
• GiveResources – Add 50 of all resources
• GiveAllStructure – Get all structures
• GiveColors [qty] – Get all dyes

**🌍 WORLD:**
• setweather [weather] – Change weather
• r.shadowquality 0 – Boost performance
• ToggleDamageNumbers – Show damage numbers
• cheat destroywilddinos – Respawn all wild dinos
• cheat saveworld – Save the world state")

nodes.name: cheats-ai-fallback
onEnter:
say(`⚠️ I don't have a pre-built cheat list for **${user.gameName}** yet, but here are tips to find them:

🔍 **Best sources:**
• **IGN Cheats** – ign.com/wikis
• **GamesRadar** – gamesradar.com/cheats
• **CheatCC** – cheatcc.com
• **Cheat Engine** – cheatengine.org (PC games)
• **Nexus Mods** – nexusmods.com (for mod-based cheats)

Type the name of a **more specific platform or version** (e.g. *'GTA V PS4'* or *'GTA San Andreas PC'*) and I'll try to match it better! 🎮`)
